name: Centennial Park
description: Come play pickleball at Centennial Park in Crossville, TN! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, and water. The courts are free.

name: Central Baptist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Central Baptist Church in Crossville, TN! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.
open_play_schedule: Go to playtimescheduler.com (Crossville/Cookeville Region) to see times of sessions

name: Fairfield Glade Racquet Center
description: Fairfield Glade Racquet Center is a place to play pickleball in Crossville, TN. There are 12 hard courts. 8 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, and water. Reservations are available. A one-time fee is required to play.
open_play_schedule: Many sessions each week avaialble for open play. Check playtimescheduler.com (Crossville/Cookeville Region)

name: Memorial Baptist
description: Come play pickleball at Memorial Baptist in Crossville, TN! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms and lights.

name: Memorial Baptist Church
description: Memorial Baptist Church is a place to play pickleball in Crossville, TN. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are private. Reservations are not available.
open_play_schedule: Check playtime scheduler (Crossville/Cookeville Region) for days and times that courts are available

name: The Center at Fairfield Glade
description: Come play pickleball at The Center at Fairfield Glade in Crossville, TN! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, lights, and adaptive programming. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts.
open_play_schedule: Call The Center for available times to play
